title: pteridrys syrmatica
intro: Pteridrys syrmatica, also known as the "Syrmatic fern", is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Pteridrys syrmatica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve lung function, and boost the immune system. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
